title: Mailchimp API requires separate fields for contact creation
symptom: When trying to create a new contact in Mailchimp using n8n, an error occurs, while the same request works in Postman.
not_this_if: Using a different node or integration
root_cause: The Mailchimp API requires individual fields for contact information (like FNAME, LNAME) rather than a single JSON object. If the data is sent as a JSON object, it will not be processed correctly, leading to errors.
fix_steps: Add each field separately (e.g., FNAME, LNAME) instead of as a single JSON object
agent_instruction: Add each contact field separately in the Mailchimp node settings.
